name: Quick and Easy Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup (10-3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine soup and milk; set aside.
2. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, cook beef until browned, stirring to separate. Spoon off fat.
3. Stir in spaghetti sauce. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
5. In an 8-inch square baking dish, spoon half the meat mixture and arrange half the noodles over the mixture; trim to fit. Spoon half the soup mixture over noodles. Repeat layers. Sprinkle with cheese.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbling. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
